name: Dusk
effect: Confirm all eyes shut; resolve any dusk‑timed Travellers or Fabled.
Convert neighbours into unique Minions; let them know.
Kazali chooses players to be Minions; let them know.
Reveal to Boffin & Demon the Demon's Townsfolk ability.
Philosopher may adopt any good ability; if duplicated, the original becomes drunk.
Reveal to Alchemist their Minion ability.
Skip Minion & Demon phases, except for bluffs.
Give the Secret Phrase.
In Minion and Demon info, reveal the Magician.

name: Minion info
effect: Show Minions each other and the Demon.
Show 3 not-in-play characters to the Minions.
Simulate Demon info to Lunatic; reveal to the Demon the Lunatic & their targets.
Add the Night Marker. Show Summoner 3 bluffs.

name: Demon info
effect: Show the Demon their Minions, then 3 bluffs.
Reveal to the Demon who the King is.
Sailor chooses a player; either that player or the Sailor is drunk.
Reveal to the Demon the Marionette.
Engineer may swap the Demon or all Minions; let them know.
Preacher chooses a player; if a Minion, they lose the ability & learn who the Preacher is.
Minions choose Lil' Monsta's token babysitter.
Lleech chooses a host; poison them.
Add the night marker. If this is X, everyone is poisoned.
Poisoner poisons a player.
Show the Widow the Grimoire, then let them poison a player.
Courtier may choose a character to become drunk.
Snake Charmer chooses a player; if Demon, swap tokens & poison new Snake Charmer.
Show which Outsiders are in play.
Organ Grinder may make themself drunk.
Devil's Advocate chooses a player; they are safe from execution tomorrow.
Wake both twins together; reveal each other’s character.
Witch curses a player.
Cerenovus makes a player mad as a chosen good character.
Fearmonger chooses a player. Announce a choice was made.
Harpy makes a player mad another is evil.
Give Mezepheles the secret word.
Pukka poisons a player.
Show Pixie an in‑play Townsfolk token.
Huntsman may choose a player; if Damsel, they become a Townsfolk; let them know.
Show the Damsel token to the Minions.
Amnesiac may wake, and might take actions.
Reveal a Townfolk & 2 players.
Reveal an Outsider & 2 players, OR indicate 0.
Reveal a Minion & 2 players.
Indicate the number of evil pairs.
Indicate how many neighbours are evil.
Fortune Teller chooses 2 players. Indicate if either is the Demon.
Show the Grandmother their grandchild.
Indicate steps between closest Minion & Demon.
Dreamer chooses a player. Reveal 1 true & 1 false character.
Seamstress may chooses 2 players. Indicate if they're aligned.
Reveal 1 good player.
Reveal 2 non-Demon players.
Reveal 2 good players & 1 evil player.
Indicate a player of a character type not yet shown.
Indicate the direction of evil.
Each Village Idiot chooses a player; indicate their alignment.
Reveal to the Bounty Hunter their target.
Nightwatchman may choose a player; reveal who the Nightwatchman is to them.
Inform the Cult Leader if their alignment has changed.
Inform the Goon if their alignment has changed.
Butler chooses a Master.
Show the Spy the Grimoire.
Ogre chooses a player. If evil, invert the Ogre.
Indicate the best player to speak to.
Indicate which side is winning.
Chambermaid chooses 2 players; indicate how many acted tonight.
Indicate how many abilities malfunctioned tonight.

name: Dawn
effect: Wake all players up.
Reveal that a Leviathan is in play. Set the day marker to 1.
Reveal the Vizier to all.
